title: AsiaGreenWood · 东园森界 — Responsibly sourced plywood from Malaysia

fields.label: Hero: first badge
fields.value: Malaysia · Since 1964

fields.label: Hero: second badge
fields.value: Plywood · Veneer · Panels

fields.label: About: heading
fields.value: A family business, rooted in six decades of craft.

fields.label: About: paragraph 1
fields.value: Asia Green Wood Sdn. Bhd. — formerly Asia Plywood Company Sdn. Bhd. — was founded in 1964. Under the leadership of Dato' Tan Boon Huat, who took over management in 1995, it grew into a family business built on integrity and trust, expanding its footprint across Europe, Asia and America.

fields.label: About: paragraph 2
fields.value: In 2023, newly appointed CEO Tan Loong Khoon (second generation) pivoted the company toward a greener vision, integrating sustainability into our core operations. With decades of manufacturing expertise behind us, we have evolved from a plywood manufacturer into a comprehensive enterprise managing forest concessions and renewable energy — moving toward a more sustainable future, filled with love and nature.

fields.label: About: vision
fields.value: To lead a new era of timber — where love guides our work, nature is our partner, and sustainability becomes a way of life.

fields.label: About: mission
fields.value: To renew the bond between people and nature — through how we work, the care we give, and the love we share.

fields.label: Sustainability: heading
fields.value: Sustainability, built into every step.

fields.label: Sustainability: source heading
fields.value: 100% sustainable sources

fields.label: Sustainability: source copy
fields.value: Every log is 100% traceable to a responsibly managed forest, fully aligned with the EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR).

fields.label: Sustainability: energy heading
fields.value: Renewable energy

fields.label: Sustainability: energy copy
fields.value: Rooftop solar and our syngas boiler & biochar facility supply the majority of our electricity — cutting carbon by up to 90%.

fields.label: Sustainability: forest heading
fields.value: Forest management

fields.label: Sustainability: forest copy
fields.value: Cable-based Logfisher extraction minimises ground disturbance, protecting the forest floor and the wider ecosystem.

fields.label: Sustainability: water heading
fields.value: Water treatment

fields.label: Sustainability: water copy
fields.value: Glue-contaminated wastewater is never discharged into public canals — it is treated to extract harmful resins and formaldehyde.

fields.label: Sustainability: factory heading
fields.value: Sustainability, engineered into our factory

fields.label: Sustainability: factory copy
fields.value: At Asia Green Wood, sustainability is built into the factory itself. We have fitted as much rooftop solar as the available roof area allows — currently supplying 15–25% of our electricity — and run dust-extraction systems, low-emission E1 adhesives and LED lighting throughout. Glue-contaminated wastewater is never released into public irrigation canals; it is treated to remove harmful resins and formaldehyde, while production residues are separated and recycled rather than sent to landfill.

fields.label: Sustainability: circular economy heading
fields.value: Syngas boiler, biochar & a circular economy

fields.label: Sustainability: circular economy copy
fields.value: Our advanced syngas boiler and biochar facility converts our own wood waste into clean electricity — supplying 70–75% of our total electricity and savings while reducing carbon by up to 90%. The biochar it produces becomes a high-value co-product for road base, concrete and sustainable agriculture, closing the loop on waste and creating a new revenue stream within a circular, low-carbon economy.

fields.label: Process: heading
fields.value: From standing tree to finished panel — five stages.

fields.label: Process: sourcing
fields.value: Log selection from legally verified, responsibly managed concessions across peninsular Malaysia and Sabah.

fields.label: Process: peeling and drying
fields.value: Logs are rotary-peeled into veneer and kiln-dried to 6–10% moisture on Japanese drying lines.

fields.label: Process: glue and lay-up
fields.value: Cross-laminated in odd-number plies with E0 / E1 / WBP adhesive systems, matched to end-use.

fields.label: Process: hot press
fields.value: Panels are pressed, cured and trimmed. Each is stamped with batch, grade and moisture values.

fields.label: Process: grade and ship
fields.value: Seasoned graders sort to BB-face / A-grade. Pallets are strapped, fumigated and containerised.

fields.label: Asia: heading
fields.value: Ancient heritage of coexisting with the forest.

fields.label: Asia: paragraph 1
fields.value: Represents Asia's ancient heritage of coexisting harmoniously with forests and wood. Since ancient times, wood has been an integral part of daily life — bringing warmth, shelter, and a deep connection to nature into every home.

fields.label: Asia: paragraph 2
fields.value: By embracing wood, we reconnect with nature and revive a timeless cultural relationship between humanity and the forest, sharing this wisdom with the world.

fields.label: Green: heading
fields.value: Nurturing a world that grows like a living garden.

fields.label: Green: copy
fields.value: Symbolizes our commitment to sustainability, green energy, and environmental stewardship. It reflects our vision of nurturing a world that functions like a living garden — where forests thrive, ecosystems are respected, and growth is balanced with responsibility.

fields.label: Wood: heading
fields.value: Promoting wood culture, responsibly.

fields.label: Wood: quote
fields.value: Wood is a natural resource meant to be used, yet it must be treated with respect and responsibility. Through mindful and sustainable use, we honor nature while ensuring forests continue to flourish for future generations.

fields.label: Wood: copy
fields.value: Embodies the promotion of wood culture worldwide — because wood connects us to the living world, and how we use it defines our relationship with the future.

fields.label: Products: heading
fields.value: Export-grade panels, cut to your specification.

fields.label: Contact: heading
fields.value: Request a sample, a quote, or a factory visit.
